title: Q:  could verilator specify dump hierarchy ?
body:
For some large Modules, dump the whole hierachy results in a very large waveform size, and also slows down the simulation speed.  Even though I know that there have method to  specify a dump period, it still cannot meet thedemand.
so is there any way to dump the hierachy which i care about, or switch off which i dont care, something like this:
```verilog
initial begin
    $fsdbDumpfile("./turbo_tb.fsdb") ;
    $fsdbDumpvars(0,tb.gpsTop.ctrl);           //open dump on this hierarchy
    $fsdbDumpvars(2, tb.gpsTop.corrlator.ctrl);//open dump on this hierarchy
    $fsdbDumpOff(tb.gpsTop.corrlator.vau);     //close dump on this hierarchy
    $fsdbDumpflush;
end    
```
